phrases.cultural_note: The permanent collection of the Musée d'Art et d'Histoire is free. Temporary exhibitions may have a fee.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a museum map or audio guide
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me donner un plan du musée ou un audioguide ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo muh doh-NAY un PLOHN doo moo-ZAY oo un OH-dyoh-geed
phrases.cultural_note: The museum is large and a floor plan is very useful. Audio guides are available in several languages including French, English and German.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the temporary exhibition is
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée d'Art et d'Histoire regularly hosts temporary exhibitions alongside its permanent collection.

responses.english: On the first floor, on the left.
responses.phonetic: oh pruh-MYAY ay-TAHZH, soor lah GOHSH
responses.local: Au premier étage, sur la gauche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the museum is free
phrases.cultural_note: Entry to the permanent collections of all Geneva municipal museums, including the MAH, is free. Temporary exhibitions may require a ticket.

responses.english: Yes, the permanent collection is free.
responses.phonetic: wee, lah koh-lek-SYOHN pehr-mah-NAHNT eh grah-TWEET
responses.local: Oui, la collection permanente est gratuite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the museum café is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve le café du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV luh kah-FAY doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum café is located on the ground floor and opens onto the terrace — a pleasant spot for a break between the galleries.

responses.english: On the ground floor, near the entrance.
